tagline: Databricks JDBC Driver (Simba) version 2.7.5 is now available with the following improvements: New features The connector now supports Kerberos with proxy connections.
what_it_does: Databricks JDBC Driver (Simba) version 2.7.5 is now available with the following improvements: New features The connector now supports Kerberos with proxy connections. To enable Kerberos proxy, set UseProxy=1 and ProxyAuth=2. To set proxy details, use ProxyHost, ProxyPort, ProxyKrbRealm, ProxyKrbFQDN, and ProxyKrbService.
why_it_matters: Databricks JDBC Driver (Simba) version 2.7.5 is now available with the following improvements: New features The connector now supports Kerberos with proxy connections.
plain_summary: Databricks JDBC Driver (Simba) version 2.7.5 is now available with the following improvements: New features The connector now supports Kerberos with proxy connections. To enable Kerberos proxy, set UseProxy=1 and ProxyAuth=2.
key_takeaway: Databricks JDBC Driver (Simba) version 2.7.5 is now available with the following improvements: New features The connector now supports Kerberos with proxy connections.
